  openfang init                 Initialize config and data directories
  openfang start                Start the kernel daemon
  openfang tui                  Launch the interactive terminal dashboard
  openfang chat                 Quick chat with the default agent
  openfang agent new coder      Spawn a new agent from a template
  openfang models list          Browse available LLM models
  openfang add github           Install the GitHub integration
  openfang doctor               Run diagnostic health checks
  openfang channel setup        Interactive channel setup wizard
  openfang cron list            List scheduled jobs
  openfang uninstall            Completely remove OpenFang from your system

Quick Start:
  1. openfang init              Set up config + API key
  2. openfang start             Launch the daemon
  3. openfang chat              Start chatting!

More:
  Docs:       https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang
  Dashboard:  http://127.0.0.1:4200/ (when daemon is running)

## v0.4.9

### Bug Fixed

-   **Image pipeline ([#686](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/686))**: REST API and WebSocket now pass image attachments as `content_blocks` directly to the LLM via `send_message_with_handle_and_blocks()` / `send_message_streaming()`. Previously images were injected as a separate session message and never reached vision models in the current turn. All 3 API entry points (REST, WebSocket, channels) now use the same flow.

### Docs

-   Added community troubleshooting FAQ: Docker setup, Caddy basicauth, embedding model config, email allowed\_senders, Z.AI/GLM-5 config, Kimi 2.5, OpenRouter free models, Claude Code integration, trader hand permissions, multiple Telegram bots workaround.

### Full changelog since v0.4.4

26 bugs fixed, 6 features shipped, 100+ PRs reviewed, 65+ issues resolved across v0.4.4–v0.4.9.

-   Fix LINE token detection heuristic — long tokens (>80 chars) recognized as direct values ([#729](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/729))
-   Fix General Assistant max\_iterations too low — bumped from 50 to 100 ([#719](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/719))
-   Fix knowledge\_query SQL parameter binding mismatch ([#638](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/638))
-   Fix WhatsApp Cloud API silently swallowing send errors ([#707](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/707))
-   Fix dashboard provider dropdown missing local providers ([#683](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/683))

### Previous (v0.4.5–v0.4.7)

-   Fix Gemini infinite loop on Thinking-only responses ([#704](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/704))
-   Fix tool\_blocklist not detected on daemon restart ([#666](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/666))
-   Fix MCP credentials from .env/vault ([#660](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/660))
-   Fix image base64 compaction storms ([#648](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/648))

-   Fix duplicate sessions ([#651](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/651))

[v0.4.3](/RightNow-AI/openfang/releases/tag/v0.4.3)

## Bug Fixes

-   **Open links in new tab** ([#612](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/612)): External links in markdown agent responses now open in a new tab with `target="_blank"`.
-   **Browser hand install** ([#611](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/611)): Homebrew "already an App at" message now correctly recognized as success instead of failure.
-   **"FREE is not a valid model"** ([#610](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/610)): Added `"free"`, `"openrouter/free"`, and `"free-reasoning"` aliases for OpenRouter free-tier models.
-   **WhatsApp drops media** ([#605](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/605)): Gateway now handles images, voice notes, videos, documents, and stickers with descriptive placeholders instead of silently dropping them.
-   **WhatsApp sender metadata** ([#597](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/597)): Sender identity (phone, name) now flows end-to-end from API → kernel → system prompt. Agents know who sent each message.
-   **Config overwrite warning** ([#578](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/578)): Web dashboard shows a warning toast when saving an API key triggers an auto-provider-switch.
-   **Linux libssl error** ([#582](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/582)): OpenSSL is now statically compiled via vendored feature — no runtime libssl dependency.

## Enhancements

-   **Minimax global URL** ([#576](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/576)): Default URL switched to global endpoint (`api.minimax.io/v1`). China users can override via `[provider_urls]` in config.toml.

[v0.4.2](/RightNow-AI/openfang/releases/tag/v0.4.2)

## Bug Fixes

-   **LoopGuard poll detection** ([#603](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/603)): Removed fragile `cmd.len() < 50` heuristic. Poll detection is now purely keyword-based — long kubectl/docker commands are correctly identified.
-   **Custom model provider display** ([#581](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/581)): Model switcher dropdown now shows `provider:model` format instead of just the display name.
-   **Telegram typing indicator** ([#571](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/571)): Typing indicator now refreshes every 4 seconds continuously during LLM processing, instead of expiring after 5 seconds.
-   **"No agent selected" error** ([#569](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/569)): Agents created via API are now immediately registered in the channel router's name cache.
-   **Tool calls denied by approval** ([#537](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/537)): Denial message now includes guidance to use `auto_approve = true` in config.toml or `--yolo` flag.
-   **WhatsApp sender metadata** ([#597](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/597)): MessageRequest and PromptContext now have sender\_id/sender\_name fields for identity-aware agents.
-   **LLM auth boot failure** ([#572](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/572)): Already fixed in v0.4.0 (auto-detect fallback). Commented for users on older versions.

## Enhancements

-   **NVIDIA NIM provider** ([#579](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/579)): Added as OpenAI-compatible provider with 5 models (nemotron-70b, llama-3.1-405b/70b, mistral-large, nemotron-4-340b). Set `NVIDIA_API_KEY` to use.
-   **YOLO mode** ([#573](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/573)): `openfang start --yolo` auto-approves all tool calls. Also configurable via `auto_approve = true` in `[approval]` section.
-   **Skill output persistence** ([#596](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/issues/596)): Tool/skill output cards in dashboard now default to expanded instead of collapsed, keeping results visible.

| **@opencode-ai/plugin** | 1.2.27 | 1.2.27 | ✅ Актуально |

---

### OpenFang — Критическое обновление!

Вы используете **v0.3.48** от 13 Mar, а latest — **v0.5.1** от 20 Mar.

**Между версиями:**
- v0.4.x → v0.5.x — огромный飞跃 (Milestone Release)
- **Image generation pipeline** (DALL-E/GPT-Image) — может решить вашу проблему с картинками!
- Docker sandbox runtimes
- Shell skill runtime
- 29 bugs fixed, 6 features shipped

**Репо:** https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang/releases

---

### Рекомендация

**Обновить OpenFang** — это может исправить:
1. Проблему с генерацией изображений (image pipeline)
2. Cron delivery bugs
3. Duplicate sessions
4. MCP credentials issues

Хотите план обновления OpenFang?
go update

curl: {"error":{"message":"User not found.","code":401}}

**Решение:**
1. Получить новый API key на https://openrouter.ai/keys
2. Обновить в `.env` файле

parts.text:
Confirmed - the OpenRouter API key is invalid. The daemon is returning 500 errors because it can't authenticate with OpenRouter. This is the root cause of why the workflow is stuck.

Let me inform the user about this.

## ❌ Проблема подтверждена

**OpenRouter API key невалиден** — все агенты падают с ошибкой:

```
LLM driver error: Auth error: {"error":{"message":"User not found.","code":401}}
```

**Workflow остановился** на ШАГ 3 — генерация статьи не работает.

---

**Для продолжения нужно:**
1. Получить новый ключ на https://openrouter.ai/keys
2. Обновить `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` в `~/.openfang/.env`
3. Перезапустить daemon: `openfang stop && openfang start`

Хотите обновить API ключ?
